body:
toolbox_llamaindex.client ToolboxClient Objects class ToolboxClient() __init__ def __init__(url: str, client_headers: Optional[Mapping[str, Union[Callable[[], str], Callable[[], Awaitable[str]], str]]] = None, protocol: Protocol = Protocol.MCP, telemetry_enabled: bool = False) -> None Initializes the ToolboxClient for the Toolbox service at the given URL.
Arguments:
url - The base URL of the Toolbox service. telemetry_enabled - Whether to enable OpenTelemetry tracing and metrics. (Default: False) aload_tool async def aload_tool( tool_name: str, auth_token_getters: dict[str, Callable[[], str]] = {}, auth_tokens: Optional[dict[str, Callable[[], str]]] = None, auth_headers: Optional[dict[str, Callable[[], str]]] = None, bound_params: dict[str, Union[Any, Callable[[], Any]]] = {}) -> ToolboxTool Loads the tool with the given tool name from the Toolbox service.
Arguments:
tool_name - The name of the tool to load. auth_token_getters - An optional mapping of authentication source names to functions that retrieve ID tokens. auth_tokens - Deprecated. Use auth_token_getters instead. auth_headers - Deprecated. Use auth_token_getters instead. bound_params - An optional mapping of parameter names to their bound values. Returns:
A tool loaded from the Toolbox.
aload_toolset async def aload_toolset(toolset_name: Optional[str] = None, auth_token_getters: dict[str, Callable[[], str]] = {}, auth_tokens: Optional[dict[str, Callable[[], str]]] = None, auth_headers: Optional[dict[str, Callable[[], str]]] = None, bound_params: dict[str, Union[Any, Callable[[], Any]]] = {}, strict: bool = False) -> list[ToolboxTool] Loads tools from the Toolbox service, optionally filtered by toolset name.
Arguments:
toolset_name - The name of the toolset to load. If not provided, all tools are loaded. auth_token_getters - An optional mapping of authentication source names to functions that retrieve ID tokens. auth_tokens - Deprecated. Use auth_token_getters instead. auth_headers - Deprecated. Use auth_token_getters instead. bound_params - An optional mapping of parameter names to their bound values. strict - If True, raises an error if any loaded tool instance fails to utilize at least one provided parameter or auth token (if any provided). If False (default), raises an error only if a user-provided parameter or auth token cannot be applied to any loaded tool across the set. Returns:
A list of all tools loaded from the Toolbox.
load_tool def load_tool( tool_name: str, auth_token_getters: dict[str, Callable[[], str]] = {}, auth_tokens: Optional[dict[str, Callable[[], str]]] = None, auth_headers: Optional[dict[str, Callable[[], str]]] = None, bound_params: dict[str, Union[Any, Callable[[], Any]]] = {}) -> ToolboxTool Loads the tool with the given tool name from the Toolbox service.
Arguments:
tool_name - The name of the tool to load. auth_token_getters - An optional mapping of authentication source names to functions that retrieve ID tokens. auth_tokens - Deprecated. Use auth_token_getters instead. auth_headers - Deprecated. Use auth_token_getters instead. bound_params - An optional mapping of parameter names to their bound values. Returns:
A tool loaded from the Toolbox.
load_toolset def load_toolset(toolset_name: Optional[str] = None, auth_token_getters: dict[str, Callable[[], str]] = {}, auth_tokens: Optional[dict[str, Callable[[], str]]] = None, auth_headers: Optional[dict[str, Callable[[], str]]] = None, bound_params: dict[str, Union[Any, Callable[[], Any]]] = {}, strict: bool = False) -> list[ToolboxTool] Loads tools from the Toolbox service, optionally filtered by toolset name.
Arguments:
toolset_name - The name of the toolset to load. If not provided, all tools are loaded. auth_token_getters - An optional mapping of authentication source names to functions that retrieve ID tokens. auth_tokens - Deprecated. Use auth_token_getters instead. auth_headers - Deprecated. Use auth_token_getters instead. bound_params - An optional mapping of parameter names to their bound values. strict - If True, raises an error if any loaded tool instance fails to utilize at least one provided parameter or auth token (if any provided). If False (default), raises an error only if a user-provided parameter or auth token cannot be applied to any loaded tool across the set. Returns:
A list of all tools loaded from the Toolbox.
close def close() Close the underlying synchronous client.
__aenter__ async def __aenter__() Enter the runtime context related to this client instance.
Allows the client to be used as an asynchronous context manager (e.g., async with ToolboxClient(...) as client:).
Returns:
self - The client instance itself. __aexit__ async def __aexit__(exc_type, exc_val, exc_tb) Exit the runtime context and close the internally managed session.
Allows the client to be used as an asynchronous context manager (e.g., async with ToolboxClient(...) as client:).
__enter__ def __enter__() Enter the runtime context related to this client instance.
Allows the client to be used as a context manager (e.g., with ToolboxClient(...) as client:).
Returns:
self - The client instance itself. __exit__ def __exit__(exc_type, exc_val, exc_tb) Exit the runtime context and close the internally managed session.
Allows the client to be used as a context manager (e.g., with ToolboxClient(...) as client:).
toolbox_llamaindex.tools ToolboxTool Objects class ToolboxTool(AsyncBaseTool) A subclass of LlamaIndex’s AsyncBaseTool that supports features specific to Toolbox, like bound parameters and authenticated tools.
__init__ def __init__(core_tool: ToolboxCoreSyncTool) -> None Initializes a ToolboxTool instance.
Arguments:
core_tool - The underlying core sync ToolboxTool instance. add_auth_token_getters def add_auth_token_getters( auth_token_getters: dict[str, Callable[[], str]]) -> "ToolboxTool" Registers functions to retrieve ID tokens for the corresponding authentication sources.
Arguments:
auth_token_getters - A dictionary of authentication source names to the functions that return corresponding ID token. Returns:
A new ToolboxTool instance that is a deep copy of the current instance, with added auth token getters.
Raises:
ValueError - If any of the provided auth parameters is already registered. add_auth_token_getter def add_auth_token_getter(auth_source: str, get_id_token: Callable[[], str]) -> "ToolboxTool" Registers a function to retrieve an ID token for a given authentication source.
Arguments:
auth_source - The name of the authentication source. get_id_token - A function that returns the ID token. Returns:
A new ToolboxTool instance that is a deep copy of the current instance, with added auth token getter.
Raises:
ValueError - If the provided auth parameter is already registered. bind_params def bind_params( bound_params: dict[str, Union[Any, Callable[[], Any]]]) -> "ToolboxTool" Registers values or functions to retrieve the value for the corresponding bound parameters.
Arguments:
bound_params - A dictionary of the bound parameter name to the value or function of the bound value. Returns:
A new ToolboxTool instance that is a deep copy of the current instance, with added bound params.
Raises:
ValueError - If any of the provided bound params is already bound. bind_param def bind_param(param_name: str, param_value: Union[Any, Callable[[], Any]]) -> "ToolboxTool" Registers a value or a function to retrieve the value for a given bound parameter.
Arguments:
param_name - The name of the bound parameter. param_value - The value of the bound parameter, or a callable that returns the value. Returns:
A new ToolboxTool instance that is a deep copy of the current instance, with added bound param.
Raises:
ValueError - If the provided bound param is already bound. toolbox_llamaindex.async_client AsyncToolboxClient Objects class AsyncToolboxClient() __init__ def __init__(url: str, session: ClientSession, client_headers: Optional[Mapping[str, Union[Callable[[], str], Callable[[], Awaitable[str]], str]]] = None, protocol: Protocol = Protocol.MCP, telemetry_enabled: bool = False) Initializes the AsyncToolboxClient for the Toolbox service at the given URL.
Arguments:
url - The base URL of the Toolbox service. session - An HTTP client session. telemetry_enabled - Whether to enable OpenTelemetry tracing and metrics. (Default: False) aload_tool async def aload_tool( tool_name: str, auth_token_getters: dict[str, Callable[[], str]] = {}, auth_tokens: Optional[dict[str, Callable[[], str]]] = None, auth_headers: Optional[dict[str, Callable[[], str]]] = None, bound_params: dict[str, Union[Any, Callable[[], Any]]] = {} ) -> AsyncToolboxTool Loads the tool with the given tool name from the Toolbox service.
Arguments:
tool_name - The name of the tool to load. auth_token_getters - An optional mapping of authentication source names to functions that retrieve ID tokens. auth_tokens - Deprecated. Use auth_token_getters instead. auth_headers - Deprecated. Use auth_token_getters instead. bound_params - An optional mapping of parameter names to their bound values. Returns:
A tool loaded from the Toolbox.
aload_toolset async def aload_toolset(toolset_name: Optional[str] = None, auth_token_getters: dict[str, Callable[[], str]] = {}, auth_tokens: Optional[dict[str, Callable[[], str]]] = None, auth_headers: Optional[dict[str, Callable[[], str]]] = None, bound_params: dict[str, Union[Any, Callable[[], Any]]] = {}, strict: bool = False) -> list[AsyncToolboxTool] Loads tools from the Toolbox service, optionally filtered by toolset name.
Arguments:
toolset_name - The name of the toolset to load. If not provided, all tools are loaded. auth_token_getters - An optional mapping of authentication source names to functions that retrieve ID tokens. auth_tokens - Deprecated. Use auth_token_getters instead. auth_headers - Deprecated. Use auth_token_getters instead. bound_params - An optional mapping of parameter names to their bound values. strict - If True, raises an error if any loaded tool instance fails to utilize at least one provided parameter or auth token (if any provided). If False (default), raises an error only if a user-provided parameter or auth token cannot be applied to any loaded tool across the set. Returns:
A list of all tools loaded from the Toolbox.
close async def close() Close the underlying synchronous client.
__aenter__ async def __aenter__() Enter the runtime context related to this client instance.
Allows the client to be used as an asynchronous context manager (e.g., async with AsyncToolboxClient(...) as client:).
Returns:
self - The client instance itself. __aexit__ async def __aexit__(exc_type, exc_val, exc_tb) Exit the runtime context and close the internally managed session.
Allows the client to be used as an asynchronous context manager (e.g., async with AsyncToolboxClient(...) as client:).
toolbox_llamaindex.async_tools AsyncToolboxTool Objects class AsyncToolboxTool(AsyncBaseTool) A subclass of LlamaIndex’s AsyncBaseTool that supports features specific to Toolbox, like bound parameters and authenticated tools.
__init__ def __init__(core_tool: ToolboxCoreTool) -> None Initializes an AsyncToolboxTool instance.
Arguments:
core_tool - The underlying core async ToolboxTool instance. acall async def acall(**kwargs: Any) -> ToolOutput The coroutine that invokes the tool with the given arguments.
Arguments:
**kwargs - The arguments to the tool. Returns:
A dictionary containing the parsed JSON response from the tool invocation.
add_auth_token_getters def add_auth_token_getters( auth_token_getters: dict[str, Callable[[], str]]) -> "AsyncToolboxTool" Registers functions to retrieve ID tokens for the corresponding authentication sources.
Arguments:
auth_token_getters - A dictionary of authentication source names to the functions that return corresponding ID token getters. Returns:
A new AsyncToolboxTool instance that is a deep copy of the current instance, with added auth token getters.
Raises:
ValueError - If any of the provided auth parameters is already registered. add_auth_token_getter def add_auth_token_getter( auth_source: str, get_id_token: Callable[[], str]) -> "AsyncToolboxTool" Registers a function to retrieve an ID token for a given authentication source.
Arguments:
auth_source - The name of the authentication source. get_id_token - A function that returns the ID token. Returns:
A new ToolboxTool instance that is a deep copy of the current instance, with added auth token getter.
Raises:
ValueError - If the provided auth parameter is already registered. bind_params def bind_params( bound_params: dict[str, Union[Any, Callable[[], Any]]]) -> "AsyncToolboxTool" Registers values or functions to retrieve the value for the corresponding bound parameters.
Arguments:
bound_params - A dictionary of the bound parameter name to the value or function of the bound value. Returns:
A new AsyncToolboxTool instance that is a deep copy of the current instance, with added bound params.
Raises:
ValueError - If any of the provided bound params is already bound. bind_param def bind_param( param_name: str, param_value: Union[Any, Callable[[], Any]]) -> "AsyncToolboxTool" Registers a value or a function to retrieve the value for a given bound parameter.
Arguments:
param_name - The name of the bound parameter. param_value - The value of the bound parameter, or a callable that returns the value. Returns:
A new ToolboxTool instance that is a deep copy of the current instance, with added bound param.
Raises:
ValueError - If the provided bound param is already bound.
title: LlamaIndex (v0.7.0)
